description_long: This is a brown leather lace-up boot with a mid-calf height, featuring a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel. The boot has a classic utilitarian design, with visible stitching along the seams and a reinforced back seam for added durability. The lacing system consists of metal eyelets and round laces, allowing for a secure and adjustable fit. The surface of the leather shows a matte finish with subtle textural variations, giving it a slightly worn, realistic appearance. The sole appears to be made of a dense, dark rubber or synthetic material, providing traction and support. A small pull tab is present at the back, aiding in putting the boot on.
description: A brown leather lace-up boot with a rounded toe, matte finish, and reinforced stitching, featuring a dark rubber sole and a back pull tab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, central lacing system, and the boot's symmetrical shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth leather surface, side stitching, and the pull tab at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical back seam, pull tab, and the boot's cylindrical shaft.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the lacing, stitching, and overall boot profile.
